steps.title: Identify the key constraint on the introduction
steps.content: Since the audience is already familiar with MBC, an effective introduction can't just list Walker as one of many. It needs to establish his significance by connecting him to MBC's core mission: inspiring music students with accomplished Black classical composers.

steps.title: Apply this constraint to the choices
steps.content: D positions Walker as an exemplar of MBC's inspirational mission, establishing why his career merits discussion. The other choices either reduce him to one among many (A, C) or provide biographical facts without establishing significance (B). This matches choice D — D is correct.
